data.name: Lyndaria: Lust Adventure
data.detailed_description:
💖 ADD OUR GAMES TO YOUR WISHLIST 💖


關於此遊戲

🌴位於大西洋的神秘島嶼。無論是船隻還是衛星都未曾發現過的一片陸地，卻有那麼一個人揭開了它的面紗。亞當·格蘭特來到島上，還為它起名為「風情島」！

十年後，他的女兒瑪雅為尋找父親而來到島上，但她不知道的是：島上的每一處會有怎樣的豔遇在等待著她！🍌

這裡原始生態的自然風光令人屏息，神秘的部落其樂融融地生活著，神明和靈魂與凡人同行。勇敢而天真的年輕探險家瑪雅驚嘆於這座奇妙的島嶼，但它的陰暗面還沒有展露出來……

在尋找失蹤父親的過程中，瑪雅被捲入了部落之間的衝突。她必須要懂得色誘、精通醫術、熟悉打獵或是當一名無所畏懼的戰士，才能解開這座神秘島嶼的謎團。

  • 🍌 你可以選擇生殖器官 - 動物或人類

  • 🌴 島上各有千秋的美麗地點

  • 🦁 眾多獸控和人類角色

  • 🍍 香豔絕倫的H場景

  • 👙 衣櫃！可以為主角換上性感的服裝

  • 🌟 為每處地點量身打造的音樂

  • ❤️ 帶有H場景的畫廊

  • 👯‍♀️ 約會模擬

  • 💲 遊戲內經濟系統

在謎團重重的風情島上，眾多火爆刺激的冒險和誘惑恭候你的到來！❤️

data.short_description: 《風情島：慾望冒險》是一款非線性故事的色情視覺小說遊戲，背景設定在獸控部落棲息的失落小島上。天真且勇敢的女角色瑪雅等待著一場驚險刺激、精彩紛呈的冒險之旅！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 波蘭文, 土耳其文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel(R) HD Graphics 612
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Lyndaria: Lust Adventure
data.detailed_description:
💖 ADD OUR GAMES TO YOUR WISHLIST 💖


About the Game

🌴 Mysterious and uncharted island in the Atlantic Ocean. A piece of land that neither ships nor the ubiquitous satellites have found. But one man did. Adam Grant was able to reach the island and gave it a name - Lyndaria!

Ten years later, his daughter Maya arrives on the island to finally find her father, but she has no idea what sexual adventures await her at every corner! 🍌

Here pristine nature is breathtaking in its splendour, mysterious tribes live in harmony with it, and gods and spirits walk among mortals. Brave and naive young explorer Maya is enchanted by the marvellous island, but she has yet to see its dark side…

In her search for her missing father, Maya is forced to intervene in conflicts between tribes. She will have to become a cunning seductress, a wise healer, a skilful hunter or a fearless warrior to unravel the mystery of the enigmatic island.

  • 🍌You can choose genitals - animal or human

  • 🌴 Different beautiful locations of the Island

  • 🦁 A lot of furry and human characters

  • 🍍Beautiful H-scenes

  • 👙 Wardrobe! You can change sexy outfits for the main character

  • 🌟 Custom music for each location

  • ❤️ Gallery with h-scenes

  • 👯‍♀️ Dating sim

  • 💲In-game currency

Many hot adventures and temptations await you on the mysterious island - Lyndaria! ❤️

data.short_description: Lyndaria: Lust Adventure is a non-linear erotic visual novel set on a lost island inhabited by Furry tribes. The naive but courageous character - Maya is waiting for exciting adventures, dangerous and savoury!
data.supported_languages: English, Russian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Turkish, Portuguese - Brazil

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • Processor: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel(R) HD Graphics 612
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
